{{CargoRelic
|name=Nethrone's Head
|class_id=20255
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This skull, adorned with the pharaoh's crown, comes from Nethrone, one of the eight Great Demon Gods. With the power of death, he ruled the Kemetic Domain. But in a duel with a snail, he brought death upon himself, and his head was taken off as a souvenir.
|fame=18
|art=12
|fth=31
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail HP +100<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail HP +200<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss3=Snail ATK +60<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail HP +300<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail HP +300<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail HP +300<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
